title: The Sword of Legend
description: Adds four cool looking sticks to fight with.
body:
# The Sword of Legend
![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/aa6c3c7b64552dc8e6d37c0677bbe46edbe9a4c7/badge/svg/toybox/compact.svg)
> I found the legendary sword!

The Sword of Legend adds four cool looking sticks to be used in combat! They can be obtained very rarely as a drop from breaking leaves. They are roughly equivalent to iron, but they have a lower durability of 128 and a very high enchantability! Furthermore, each sword has unique stats making them better in specific situations!
